mapper.sql: id, dict_code, dict_name, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE dict_code = #{dictCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_type SET dict_code = #{dictCode}, dict_name = #{dictName}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
